name: Cartrack African Fleet and Vehicle Tracking API
what_it_does: Cartrack African fleet and vehicle tracking REST API for fleet operators, insurance companies, and security companies across South Africa, sub-Saharan Africa, Europe, and Southeast Asia to access real-time vehicle location, stolen vehicle tracking and recovery, fleet management, driver behavior analytics, and fuel consumption monitoring — enabling automated vehicle security, fleet monitoring, and risk management through Cartrack's stolen vehicle recovery and fleet management platform. Enables AI agents to manage vehicle tracking for real-time location monitoring automation, handle stolen vehicle for security alert and recovery automation, access driver behavior for fleet safety coaching automation, retrieve fuel data for consumption analysis automation, manage geofencing for territory violation alerting automation, handle fleet reporting for vehicle utilization automation, access maintenance scheduling for vehicle service automation, retrieve insurance telematics for usage-based insurance automation, manage emergency response for SOS and panic button automation, and integrate Cartrack with fleet management systems, insurance platforms, and security response networks for vehicle security and fleet optimization automation.
use_cases: Monitoring African fleet vehicles in real-time with stolen vehicle recovery capabilities for fleet security automation agents
Accessing driver behavior and risk scores for African fleet insurance telematics program automation agents
Managing fuel consumption and vehicle utilization analytics for African logistics fleet optimization automation agents
Integrating Cartrack vehicle data with insurance underwriting for usage-based insurance product automation agents
not_for: Personal vehicle tracking without insurance or fleet context (Cartrack primarily serves fleet and insurance markets)
Non-tracking asset management (Cartrack is vehicle/fleet telematics, not general asset management)
Real-time video telematics (Cartrack focuses on GPS tracking and telematics, not video AI)
best_when: An African fleet operator, insurance company, or security company wanting AI agents to access real-time vehicle tracking, stolen vehicle recovery capabilities, driver behavior data, and fleet analytics through Cartrack's South African and pan-African vehicle tracking platform.
avoid_when: CARTRACK HARDWARE REQUIRED: Cartrack API provides data only from Cartrack-manufactured tracking devices; automated hardware-agnostic assumption creates no data for non-Cartrack devices; automated must have Cartrack devices installed in vehicles. ENTERPRISE FLEET OR INSURANCE CONTRACT: Cartrack fleet/insurance API requires enterprise agreement; automated open API access assumption creates no available endpoint; automated must establish Cartrack fleet or insurance partner agreement. SOUTH AFRICA IS PRIMARY MARKET: While Cartrack operates in multiple markets, South Africa is primary and most feature-complete; automated uniform global coverage assumption creates feature_not_available for some markets; automated must verify feature availability per country. STOLEN VEHICLE TRACKING REQUIRES LEGAL AUTHORIZATION: Accessing stolen vehicle tracking data requires proper legal authorization and law enforcement involvement; automated direct stolen vehicle access assumption creates unauthorized tracking concern; automated must follow proper legal channels for stolen vehicle recovery.

auth.notes: Cartrack uses API key + OAuth2 for fleet/partner API authentication. REST API with JSON. Johannesburg, South Africa HQ. Founded 2001 by Zak Calisto. Products: Vehicle tracking, stolen vehicle recovery, fleet management, driver behavior, fuel monitoring, usage-based insurance telematics. SDKs: None public. JSE listed (CTK). Operations in South Africa, sub-Saharan Africa, Europe, Southeast Asia. 1.8M+ subscribers. Competes with MiX Telematics for South African fleet tracking.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Integration sandbox for approved fleet/insurance partners; production requires enterprise agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-vehicle/month subscription; hardware costs; insurance telematics data licensing; enterprise contracts
pricing.notes: Johannesburg ZA. JSE:CTK. Per-vehicle subscription. 1.8M+ subscribers. Africa and global fleet telematics.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; tracking and event APIs throttled per fleet tier

known_agent_gotchas: CARTRACK DEVICE MANDATORY: Only Cartrack-manufactured tracking devices transmit data to Cartrack API; automated bring-your-own-device assumption creates no data stream; automated must have Cartrack hardware installed and connected

SOUTH AFRICA PRIMARY MARKET: Cartrack's most complete API features are in South Africa; other markets may have limited API feature availability; automated uniform global feature assumption creates feature_not_available in non-ZA markets; automated must verify country-specific feature availability

STOLEN VEHICLE ACCESS REQUIRES AUTHORIZATION: Accessing stolen vehicle tracking requires legal process and authorization; automated direct theft tracking assumption creates unauthorized access concern; automated must implement proper legal authorization workflow for stolen vehicle recovery scenarios

POPIA COMPLIANCE REQUIRED: South African POPIA (Protection of Personal Information Act) requires proper data handling for employee vehicle tracking; automated employee tracking without consent assumption creates POPIA violation; automated must implement POPIA-compliant employee consent for workplace vehicle tracking

REAL-TIME EVENTS ARE WEBHOOK-DRIVEN: Vehicle events (speed violations, geofence breaks, panic) are delivered via webhook; automated polling-only assumption creates delayed event response; automated must implement webhook handler for time-sensitive vehicle security events
agent_readiness.security_notes: African vehicle tracking. POPIA, GDPR. API key + OAuth2. South Africa/global. Vehicle location and fleet security data.

security_score_components.security_notes: African fleet telematics. POPIA, GDPR. API key + OAuth2. South Africa/global. Vehicle and driver tracking data.
